outcome: Make the real off-product production storage path consume all three promoted target archives and match their independent package, metadata, layout, value, validity, statistics, transform, and identity facts.

Add one bounded and cancellable scientific-content validation step over the exact-package capability; issue a stronger verified-science capability only after the computed identifier matches the package declarations.
Reject every promoted mutation through the production path with a typed rejection at its owning validation stage.
Prove production-writer output against the pinned schema and independent reader without treating Mirante writer/reader agreement as conformance.
Close the remaining WP-10A scalability evidence with deterministic work bounds and a bounded representative-large-metadata subprocess measurement.
invariants: The promoted corpus, expected facts, vectors, mutations, pinned standards, and independent lineages are immutable read-only authority.
Expected target facts remain test/evidence inputs and never enter a production acceptance branch.

Scientific validation reads base scale in canonical logical order, canonicalizes invalid samples to positive zero, rejects valid non-finite float32 samples, retains bounded working memory, and polls cancellation throughout.
Exact PackageId and ScientificContentId remain separate typed authorities; neither a path, slug, bare digest, nor manifest fingerprint may substitute for them.
There is one strict target reader/writer path with mandatory sharding and no compatibility reader, converter, fallback, or alternate decoder.
The crate remains EXPERIMENTAL and unreachable from the product until WP-10C.
forbidden_paths: all existing product, importer, project, runtime, renderer, GPU, interaction, and UI paths

authority_flip.new: one production conformance gate over the existing exact-package capability, followed by one verified-scientific-package capability after full scientific validation
deleted: the status claim that production target-corpus consumption is absent
the status claim that production scientific-ID verification is absent
the planned placeholder for the format-lifecycle verification lane
any duplicate production decoder or test-only acceptance route introduced during implementation
unchanged: current schema-1 remains the sole product route until WP-10C
no generic OME-Zarr, stable-format, product-support, importer, or public-data claim

implementation_checkpoints: D1: accepted entry, exact public API/error contract, and read-only target harness
D2: bounded scientific verification plus all positive and negative production-reader evidence
D3: production-writer external readback, deterministic scalability evidence, format-lifecycle lane activation, and WP-10A closure
non_goals: Product activation, viewer opening, schema-1 deletion, or product-open validation
TIFF import, multiscale generation, replacement, migration, or conversion
Project persistence or current-source identity bridging
DS-1 through DS-4 viewer, GPU, or real-data performance qualification
CANDIDATE or STABLE lifecycle, generic OME-Zarr support, remote stores, labels, tables, or public microscopy-data publication
stop_conditions: Any positive target fact or typed identity differs from the promoted authority.
Any promoted mutation is accepted, reaches an ambiguous stage, or requires weakening the frozen profile.
Production-writer output fails the pinned schema or independent reader.
The implementation requires editing target authority, identity algorithms, normative standards, dependencies, product paths, or adding a compatibility route.
Scientific verification requires full-array or full-package materialization instead of bounded streaming.

acceptance: All three positive archives pass exact and scientific production validation and match independent facts through every logical brick.
All fifteen promoted mutations fail at the declared typed production boundary.
Production output is accepted by the pinned schema and independent reader and matches the applicable independent facts.
The conformance report records logical bricks, addressed and actual shards, object/depth/fan-out counts, and one-brick encoded/read/decode amplification.
Deterministic N/2N/4N work accounting rules out a quadratic validity/index/scientific path, and the representative metadata subprocess stays inside its entry-bound time and RSS limits.
The format-lifecycle lane owns this exact target command, both required repository checks pass on the clean committed revision, and hosted checks pass.
evidence.product_open: not applicable because this package remains off-product and changes no viewer, loading, rendering, interaction, GPU, or large-dataset product path

claim_boundary.io3: only the two exact IO-2-eligible target cases after pinned schema and external readback
claim_boundary.io1: the exact arbitrary-affine float32 target case
claim_boundary.forbidden: generic OME-Zarr, stable format, product support, public-data reproducibility, or product-open claims

rollback.unit: D1 and D2 are independently revertible; D3 is the atomic WP-10A closure checkpoint
rollback.action: revert the failed checkpoint and delete ignored run evidence; do not add an alternate reader or fallback
rollback.product_rollback: none because no product authority changes
